name: Music Synth

notes.en: White keys A S D F G H J K, black keys W E T Y U. Z/X shift octave.
notes.ru: Белые клавиши A S D F G H J K, чёрные — W E T Y U. Z/X — смена октавы.

notes: Procedural Web Audio synthesis only — no sample files. Six instrument voices (piano, kalimba, organ, bells, lead, bass), each a distinct oscillator/filter/envelope recipe. Kalimba and bells are trigger-and-decay (percussive); the rest sustain while held.
